column88: This artwork serves as an end-of-year reflection for Hoi. The artist lives in a city filled with old oak trees whose roots spread across the ground, forming small pools of water. This image often makes Hoi think about how they feel at the close of a year — trying to process everything they've accomplished and everything they still need to work on.
